title: TakeawayGuard
description: TakeawayGuard is a modern and lightweight block-protection plugin that allows players to reinforce blocks, create security groups, and more!
body:
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=000000&color=F16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/takeawayguard) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=000000&color=00AF5C)](https://modrinth.com/project/takeawayguard) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=000000&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/DfWRnvmSkb) [![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/Github-NA?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=%23ffffff&color=%23000000)](https://github.com/doccyt/TakeawayGuard) [![Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/Website-NA?style=for-the-badge&color=%23ffa200)](https://doccdev.xyz)

**TakeawayGuard** is a Fast, Modern, and Light-Weight block protection plugin that seamlessly integrates with your minecraft server without causing lag or bloating. Inspired by the popular forge plugin citadel TakeawayGuard provides the same core functionalities such as: reinforcing blocks with materials such as: Stone, Iron, and Diamonds giving an assigned hp amount to that block. Takeawayguard also works with a security group format to protect these blocks with that are known as namelayers in the plugin.

Whether you run a survival server, a factions community, or simply need reliable protection for player builds, TakeawayGuard keeps everything secure while remaining easy to use for both admins and players. It's simple to set up, flexible to configure, and powerful when needed—TakeawayGuard is your server's new guardian.

_TakeawayGuard runs natively on the 1.21 versions of minecraft and has NOT been tested for previous minecraft versions._

**TakeawayGuard Commands**
Reinforcement

/tgf <group> <material>

Auto-Reinforce Mode: Automatically reinforces every block you place.

Example: /tgf Warriors DIAMOND (Every block you place will be protected with Diamond strength).

/tgr <group>

Manual Mode: Left-click existing blocks with a material to reinforce them.

/tgo

Normal Mode: Stops reinforcing blocks and returns you to normal gameplay.

/tgi

Info Mode: Right-click any block to see if it is reinforced and how much HP it has left.

Group Management

/tgg create <name> – Create a new group.

/tgg invite <player> – Invite a player to your group (they get a clickable chat message).

/tgg list – See which groups you belong to.

/tgg accept – Accept a pending group invite.

/tgg reject – Deny a pending group invite.

Admin

/tgb – Bypass Mode: Allows admins to break any reinforced block instantly.

**Permissions**
takeawayguard.use – Allows players to use all reinforcement and group commands (Default: True).

takeawayguard.admin – Allows access to /tgb (Bypass) and administrative overrides.

takeawayguard.* – Grants all permissions.
